description: QuantSync + QuantTube Core Screen Depth - QuantSync: infinite scroll feed with like/comment/repost/bookmark interactions, compose post modal, trending sidebar, community pages. QuantTube: video player with chapters/quality selector, comment section, recommendation sidebar, channel pages, upload flow.
steps: 1. Enhance apps/quantsync/src/app/page.tsx feed: Add infinite scroll with intersection observer (load more when near bottom), like button with optimistic count update + heart animation, comment count that expands inline comment thread, repost with quote-repost option, bookmark with saved indicator, share button with copy-link toast.

2. Create apps/quantsync/src/app/compose/page.tsx (or modal): Post composer with character counter (280 limit with color warning), media attachment (up to 4 images in grid), poll creator (2-4 options + duration), mention autocomplete (@username), hashtag suggestions, audience selector (public/followers/mutual).
3. Enhance apps/quantsync/src/components/TrendingSidebar.tsx: Trending topics with post counts, 'Who to follow' suggestions with follow button, promoted content section, live spaces indicator.

4. Enhance apps/quantube/src/pages/index.tsx: Add recommendation sidebar on desktop (related videos list), channel avatar links, 'Watch Later' save button on hover, video quality badge overlay. Create apps/quantube/src/pages/watch/[id].tsx with full video player page: chapters list, quality selector dropdown, comments section with reply threading, like/dislike buttons, subscribe button with count.

5. Create apps/quantube/src/pages/upload.tsx: Upload flow with drag-drop video zone, processing progress bar, metadata form (title/description/tags/category/thumbnail), visibility selector (public/unlisted/private/scheduled), publish button.
6. Create apps/quantube/src/pages/channel/[id].tsx: Channel page with banner, avatar, subscriber count, tabs (Videos/Shorts/Live/Community/About), video grid with sort options.
acceptance_criteria: QuantSync feed has infinite scroll with like/comment/repost/bookmark interactions
Post composer has character count, media attachments, poll creator
Trending sidebar shows topics and suggestions
QuantTube watch page has video player, chapters, quality selector, comments
Upload page has drag-drop, progress, metadata form
Channel page has banner, tabs, video grid
TypeScript compiles without errors for both apps
